Left longest: 5
Right longest: 3

Left winner: I none, C win, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I none, C none, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: C C-0n C-1n C-2n C-3n C-4n
Longest Right: AND 25-7 14-6 03-5

5 + 3 = 8 = 8
Not truncating

4 C 4n

Matched
0 C 0n
1 C 1n
2 C 2n
3 C 3n
4 C 4n
5 AND 03
6 AND 14
7 AND 25

Applying to 00011001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 AND 03 = AND(I 0,I 3) = AND(0,1) = 0
6 AND 14 = AND(I 1,I 4) = AND(0,1) = 0
7 AND 25 = AND(I 2,I 5) = AND(0,0) = 0

\boxed{00000000}
